ddls:
CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the folder */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym for the folder */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning or description of the folder */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the folder was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the folder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder the output belongs to */,
  "contents" TEXT /* Contents or description of the output */,
  "relies_on_variable" TEXT /* Variable the output relies on */,
  "importance_to_update" TEXT /* Importance of updating the output for new countries */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the output should be updated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the output was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic trait */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic trait */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic trait (e.g., age, sex, ethnicity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health outcome */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the health outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health outcome */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the health outcome (e.g., mortality, morbidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the pollutant (e.g., particulate matter, gases) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant being emitted */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of pollutant emitted */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of emission */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of emission (e.g., country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_outcome_incidence" (
  "incidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incidence */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health outcome */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of the health outcome per ton pollutant */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the incidence rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcome_incidence_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES health_outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_outcome_incidence_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_cost_of_carbon" (
  "scc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social cost of carbon */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "cost" REAL /* Social cost of the pollutant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of social cost estimate */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of social cost estimate (e.g., country, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_cost_of_carbon_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., folder, output, variable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., new data, new methodology) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "update_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output being updated */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition under which an update is needed */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., data threshold, methodology change) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_update_conditions_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES outputs ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
